arts.ttl: Cardiff v Peterborough, Huddersfield v Leyton Orient, and more: football – live
arts.sum: Clockwatch updates from Saturday’s football action Live scoreboard | Follow us on Bluesky | Mail Barry League One preview: Luton look the team to beat after back-to-back relegations and Stockport County have shown plenty of ambition in the transfer market, while Darren Moore’s Port Vale will be hoping to stave off the drop following their promotion last season. Will Unwin casts an eye over the runners and riders in the third tier … League Two preview: MK Dons are many pundits’ idea of likely winners under Paul Warne and Bristol Rovers will be hoping theirs is a short stay in the fourth tier, while another difficult season awaits Accrington. Will Unwin gazes into his his crystal ball … Continue reading...
